title: Wajid Khattak's Big Data Analytics Process
description: A conceptual flowchart illustrating the key stages and components of a big data analytics workflow as it might be taught in Module 5, attributed to Wajid Khattak.
relationships: Data is collected from various Sources and fed into Ingestion
Ingested data is stored in a scalable Storage system
Stored data is processed and analyzed using analytics tools
Analysis results are transformed into visual Insights
Insights inform and drive business Decision Making
